decision: Pi-wrapper belongs inside Unite-Hub as the founder daily-driver UI; Pi-Dev-Ops remains the execution engine.

priority_sequence.name: Command Centre shell
priority_sequence.goal: Create /founder/command-centre as the one-url founder cockpit.
acceptance: Authenticated route loads
Panels show priorities, approvals, Pi runs, vault/account health, model spend, integrations, browser tasks
No fake data claims; pending integrations have explicit empty states
Type-check passes
Scientific Luxury design rules obeyed

priority_sequence.name: Pi-wrapper MVP
priority_sequence.goal: Submit founder commands from Unite-Hub and return lane/model/approval receipts from a provider-neutral router.
acceptance: src/lib/pi-wrapper/types.ts exists
src/lib/pi-wrapper/router.ts classifies commands deterministically
/api/pi/route returns schema-valid JSON
/founder/pi displays receipt and next action
Tests cover route classifications

priority_sequence.name: Device Registry and Heartbeat
priority_sequence.goal: Unite-Hub can see Mac mini, Windows Desktop PC, and MacBook Pro availability/capabilities.
acceptance: Devices report last_seen, role, capabilities, availability
Command Centre shows machine status
Offline machines are visible and not silently used

priority_sequence.name: Task Packet and Context Pack Store
priority_sequence.goal: Founder chat ideas become durable packets that survive machine and provider switching.
acceptance: Idea is classified to correct portfolio app
Context pack reloads from another worker/model
Task packet stores original idea, lane, risk, model recommendation, done criteria, receipts

priority_sequence.name: Machine Assignment Router
priority_sequence.goal: Assign work to Mac mini, Windows Desktop, MacBook Pro, or cloud by capability and risk.
acceptance: Browser/heavy tasks avoid sleeping laptops
Long-running jobs prefer Mac mini
Routing tests cover browser task, heavy build, scheduled brief, mobile approval

priority_sequence.name: Run Queue UI
priority_sequence.goal: Founder can see all background agents, machines, status, blockers, and latest receipts inside Unite-Hub.
acceptance: Statuses include queued, assigned, running, waiting_for_approval, blocked, completed, failed
UI shows assigned machine, model/provider, phase, latest receipt
Phill can review progress from MacBook Pro while other machines execute

priority_sequence.name: Account Registry MVP
priority_sequence.goal: Inventory every external account before browser automation or credential use.
acceptance: accounts_registry migration drafted/applied in scoped lane
Every query filtered by founder_id
No raw password display
Statuses: unknown, verified, needs_cleanup, agent_ready, human_only

priority_sequence.name: Vault Grants and Approval Gate
priority_sequence.goal: Allow time-limited scoped grants for agent use without exposing secrets to the browser client.
acceptance: vault_access_grants model exists
Every grant has purpose, scope, expiry, status
Decrypted secrets remain server-side only
Audit events written for every use

priority_sequence.name: Browser Gateway spike
priority_sequence.goal: Prove read-only Playwright-controlled browser automation on a safe internal/demo target.
acceptance: No bank/social/tax automation in first spike
Screenshot/action receipt captured
Approval gate demonstrated
No attempt to bypass MFA or anti-bot controls

priority_sequence.name: Provider Router and Cost Dashboard
priority_sequence.goal: Route models by Performance/Speed/Cost and preserve context across provider switches.
acceptance: Model registry seeded from Nexus Hub policy
Router outputs selected_model, provider, reason, cost_band, latency_band, fallback_model, reviewer_model
Tests cover cheap routing, deep architecture, UI vision, code implementation, and browser planning

allowed: Audited credential access through server-side workers
not_allowed: Submitting tax/legal/banking changes without human approval
Exposing decrypted secrets to client-side UI

model_triangle.performance: Reasoning quality, coding quality, long-context and multimodal capability
model_triangle.cost: Token spend, provider pricing, subscription/API distinction, retry cost

first_instruction_to_agents: Do Lane 1 and Lane 2 first. Then add Device Registry/Heartbeat, Task Packets/Context Packs, Machine Assignment Router, and Run Queue UI before Account Registry, Vault Grants, or Browser Gateway.

three_machine_architecture.decision: Unite-Hub must operate across Windows Desktop PC, MacBook Pro, and Mac mini with durable context and machine-aware routing.
three_machine_architecture.product_promise: Open Unite-Hub anywhere, type an idea, and the system turns it into a tracked task packet with the right app, agents, machine, model, and approval path.
